name: GrooveNet
description: DJ collective cross-collaboration platform for promotions, roster management, event discovery, financial pooling, and marketing intelligence.

phases.name: Event Discovery + DJ Set Tracker
phases.description: Core event feed for DJs — discover gigs (paid/unpaid), track sets, ensure recordings get posted.

phases.name: DJ Profiles + Collectives
phases.description: DJ profiles, crew/group creation, roster management.

phases.name: Mix Sharing + Cross-Collab
phases.description: Share mixes across collectives, collaborative playlists.

phases.name: Promotion + Event Management
phases.description: Groups manage their own promotions, event creation, lineup building.

phases.name: Financial Management + Revenue Pool
phases.description: Per-group finances, revenue tracking, joint festival fund.

phases.name: Marketing Intelligence
phases.description: Learn from past events — what worked, what didn't, audience patterns, optimal pricing.
